3008747.title: Filmmaker spotlight - samantha shada
3008747.description: Filmmaker Spotlight gives you an insight into the filmmaking process by screening a film followed by an exclusive interview with the creator. This time we spoke with writer & director Samantha Shada about her short, 'Beauty School'.
